ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in cm */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kg */,
  "position" TEXT /* Primary position of the player */,
  "preferred_foot" TEXT /* Preferred foot of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the team's coach */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home stadium */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "champion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the league */,
  "top_scorer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the top goalscorer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's statistics */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player */,
  "own_goals" INTEGER /* Number of own goals conceded by the player */,
  "injured" INTEGER /* Number of times the player was injured */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played by the player */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Number of clean sheets */,
  "penalties_scored" INTEGER /* Number of penalties scored */,
  "penalties_missed" INTEGER /* Number of penalties missed */,
  "yellow_cards_per_match" REAL /* Average number of yellow cards per match */,
  "red_cards_per_match" REAL /* Average number of red cards per match */,
  "assists_per_match" REAL /* Average number of assists per match */,
  "goals_per_match" REAL /* Average number of goals per match */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current injury status of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award (e.g., MVP) */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date the award was received */,
  "award_category" TEXT /* Category of the award */,
  "award_description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_awards_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  "recovery_date" TEXT /* Expected date of recovery */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for contact */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was last updated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
